customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, transactional posture. Enrique is cooperative and credit-qualified but carries a latent skepticism from prior designs that failed to convince him 2-3 years ago. He is hoping this time is different — panels improved, price lower — but has not been given a specific reason to believe it will be.
unresolved_concerns: Prior solar designs did not convince him — specific failure mode unknown (company not captured, reason not probed)
Wife is co-title holder and is not confirmed on the appointment
sensitive_topics_raised: Stale lead — Enrique noted the request was made a month ago, not a couple of days ago as the rep's system showed
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment booked for tomorrow at 12:00 PM
Closer will call Enrique's cell: (202) 728-2368 (NOT the 703 landline)
Reminder text will be sent before the call
Appointment is for a phone call — Enrique should have email access during the call
closer_should_know: Enrique has seen solar designs before (2-3 years ago) and was not convinced — the company and specific failure mode were not captured. He is re-engaging because he hopes panels have improved and prices have dropped. The closer's design reveal needs to explicitly address what's changed since his last look. Also: wife is co-title holder and was not included in the appointment booking — confirm her availability at the top of the call before proceeding.
